rationale: In the literature review, the authors identify Nikolova and Inman (2015) as the closest prior study on promoting simplified nutrition labels. They explicitly discuss a limitation in that study's design - NuVal promotion coinciding with product promotions - and use this to motivate their own identification strategy. This is more than background mention because it directly informs how the citing paper positions its contribution.
relation_description: The citing paper refines the prior line of work represented by Nikolova and Inman (2015) by addressing a perceived confound in the earlier pre-post design. It studies a campaign that does not co-occur with product-specific promotions to better isolate information and education effects.
